REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR ON MAY-09-2005. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON JUL-01-2005 AT 9:00 AM FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT AFTER GRANTING OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT ON 05/04/05. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENNESSY, COLLEEN TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT BOSTON MEN'S HEALTH CENTER, INC.,  A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA BOSTON MEDICAL GROUP IT HEREBY ORDERED,ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT BOSTON MEDICAL & THAT PLAINTIFF COLLEEN HENNESSY TAKES NOTHING BY HER COMPLAINT. SO ORDERED.
